summary: P0 Bug Fixes Verification Complete - All 3 bugs fixed and verified. 11/11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.

bug_1_sms_modal_readability.description: SMS modal now has proper background and text colors in both light and dark modes
bug_1_sms_modal_readability.light_mode: White background (#ffffff) with dark text (#0E0B1E) - readable
bug_1_sms_modal_readability.dark_mode: Dark background (#1a1a24) with white text (#ffffff) - readable

bug_2_add_prospect_sheet_z_index.description: AddProspectSheet now displays above bottom navigation
bug_2_add_prospect_sheet_z_index.fix_applied: Merged duplicate style attributes into single style object with zIndex: 151

bug_3_pro_plus_features.description: PRO+ user (test@test.com) now has access to all premium features

sms_one_click_button_token.fix: Changed localStorage.getItem('session_token') to localStorage.getItem('kolo_token') on lines 96 and 163

add_prospect_sheet_duplicate_style.issue: Had duplicate style attributes on lines 306-307, second one overriding first (losing zIndex)
add_prospect_sheet_duplicate_style.fix: Merged into single style object with zIndex: 151

FREE_to_STARTER_rename.pricing_endpoint: Returns 'STARTER' as plan name for free tier

backend_api_tests: ✓ Trial emails requires valid API key
frontend_ui_tests: ✓ Budget slider available without PRO badge for PRO+ user
✓ SMS modal readable in light mode (white bg, dark text)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P0 bugs have been fixed and verified. Test user test@test.com is on PRO+ plan with all features enabled. SMS modal is readable in both light and dark modes. AddProspectSheet displays above bottom navigation. Pricing page shows 'Starter' instead of 'FREE'. Trial emails endpoint is working.
